name: Santa on Fire
description: Santa is TRAPPED! Pull him out of the chimney before it’s too late! Get ready for the challenging Christmas Game where every tap counts. A little boy made the fire too hot, and Santa Claus is stuck in a dangerous, fiery trap! Santa on Fire is the perfect jumping game for quick breaks. Youll need quick reflexes and perfect timing to Save Christmas! ----- Music: Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)
instructions: Christmas Day is in jeopardy and Santa Claus urgently needs your help Enjoy this addictive arcade game with simple controls - First Tap LAUNCH Santa upwards Jump - Second Tap CATCH Santa before he falls Watch out for Dangerous Obstacles You must
